message:
test(contracts): add 24 behavioral runtime tests for core↔vendored async boundary (ft-e34d9.10.5.4)

Adds vendored_async_contract_behavioral.rs with runtime-level tests that
exercise actual async behavior for each ABC contract. Complements the
existing structural/static tests in vendored_async_contract_verification.rs.

Coverage: mpsc/watch/broadcast/oneshot delivery (ABC-CHN-001/002),
timeout enforcement (ABC-TO-001), JoinSet lifecycle (ABC-TL-001/002),
semaphore backpressure (ABC-BP-001), task ownership and cancellation
(ABC-OWN-001/002, ABC-CAN-002), error mapping (ABC-ERR-001),
cross-layer pipeline integration, and full audit report assembly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
